quests.title: Supply Procurement
quests.description: You are conscripted into the Iron Hegemony. Your first mission: clear Scrap Field of Broken Scout Drones disrupting logistics. Strength through Unity.

objectives.desc: Collect salvage parts for the war machine.

quests.title: Scrap Rat Infestation
quests.description: Scrap Rats gnaw through supply crates. A soldier's first duty is to protect resources. Exterminate them.

objectives.desc: Collect Rat tails for bounty proof.

quests.title: Drone Salvage
quests.description: Scrap Drones contain valuable parts. Disable them and recover their components for the Bastion forges.

quests.title: Rust Mite Purge
quests.description: Rust Mites corrode Hegemony equipment. A soldier maintains their gear. Purge the source of corrosion.

quests.title: The Soldier's Path
quests.description: Commander Drax has noted your potential. Report to War Marshal Drax at the Bastion to choose your combat specialization.

objectives.desc: Report to War Marshal Drax at the Bastion.
Demonstrate your worth against Scrap Hounds.

quests.title: Securing Territory
quests.description: The Iron Ravine is rich in minerals. Establish a forward base and secure it for Hegemony mining operations.

quests.title: Ravine Miners
quests.description: Iron Ravine Miners refuse to yield territory. The Hegemony takes what it needs. Clear them out.

objectives.desc: Collect Ravine Ore for the forges.

quests.title: Brute Force
quests.description: An Iron Ravine Brute has crushed three mining crews. Show it the meaning of Hegemony discipline.

objectives.desc: Claim the Brute's weapon as trophy.

quests.title: Enforcer Elimination
quests.description: A Scrapfield Enforcer has established dominance over the central ravine. Challenge its authority. Hegemony bows to no one.

objectives.desc: Destroy a Ravine Sentinel guarding the Enforcer.

quests.title: Golem Crush
quests.description: Ravine Scrap Golems are mobile fortresses of salvaged metal. Break them apart and take what the Hegemony needs.

quests.title: Frontline Duty
quests.description: The War Machine Graveyard is a battlefield of ancient titans. The Hegemony will learn from the wreckage of past wars.

quests.title: Wrecker Duty
quests.description: War Machine Wreckers scavenge the graveyard. They are competition. Eliminate them.

objectives.desc: Collect usable parts from destroyed Wreckers.

quests.title: Scavenger Hunt
quests.description: War Machine Scavengers strip the graveyard of valuable tech. The Hegemony will strip them instead.

quests.title: Sentinel Protocol
quests.description: War Machine Sentinels are automated war constructs. Disable them and reverse-engineer their combat protocols.

quests.title: Graveyard Sweep
quests.description: Conduct a full sweep of the graveyard. Leave nothing standing that is not Hegemony.

quests.title: War Machine Assault
quests.description: Multiple Sentinels are converging. This is not a threat — it is target practice.

quests.title: Bastion Supply Run
quests.description: The Bastion requires specific components from the graveyard. A soldier follows orders. Retrieve them.

quests.title: The Advance Guard
quests.description: A Sentinel Commander has activated deep in the graveyard. Destroy it and claim the graveyard for the Hegemony.

objectives.desc: Destroy the Sentinel Commander and its unit.

quests.title: The Advancement
quests.description: A Resonance Echo has been detected in the graveyard's deep sector. This anomaly threatens our position. Destroy it.

quests.title: Promotion Review
quests.description: You have proven yourself on the frontlines. Return to the Bastion for your Advanced Combat promotion review.

quests.title: Iron Incursion
quests.description: The Titan Assembly Yard was once where Precursor war machines were born. The Hegemony will make it our primary production facility.

quests.title: Drone Sweep
quests.description: Titan Assembly Drones still function on ancient protocols. Override their programming with force.

quests.title: Sentinel Outpost
quests.description: Titan Assembly Sentinels guard the central assembly line. Breach their defenses and claim the line for Hegemony production.

objectives.desc: Seize the assembly line control terminal.

quests.title: Forge Automaton
quests.description: Titan Forge Automatons are apex construction machines. Disable them and study their assembly protocols.

quests.title: Proto Core
quests.description: A Titan Proto Core — a failed Titan — has reactivated. This is a live-fire exercise. Destroy it.

quests.title: Skirmish Ring
quests.description: The Border Skirmish Ring is where factions test their strength. The Hegemony does not test — we dominate.

quests.title: Border Patrol
quests.description: Patrol the skirmish ring and eliminate any non-Hegemony forces. The border is ours.

objectives.desc: Complete border patrol and claim the badge.

quests.title: Behemoth Assault
quests.description: Aethel Behemoths are being used as living siege weapons by rival factions. Destroy the weapon before it reaches Hegemony lines.

objectives.desc: Destroy the enemy Behemoth siege units.

quests.title: Sentinel Assembly
quests.description: The Assembly Yard has produced new Sentinel variants. Test Hegemony combat doctrine against them.

quests.title: Ascension Test
quests.description: War Marshal Drax has called for your Ascension Test. Prove your strength has surpassed the rank of common soldier.

objectives.desc: Defeat the Resonance Echo as your strength test.
Destroy a Titan Proto Core as your endurance test.

quests.title: Skies of Iron
quests.description: The Hegemony now controls the ground. The next frontier is the sky. Secure the Orbital Sentinel Command.

objectives.desc: Deploy the Hegemony orbital control beacon.

quests.title: Drake Recon
quests.description: The Ashen Drake threatens Hegemony air superiority. Conduct reconnaissance and engage if necessary.

objectives.desc: Engage the Ashen Drake for reconnaissance.

quests.title: Iron Carapace Breach
quests.description: Aethel Iron Carapaces are armored threats. Hegemony tanks need live-fire practice. Be the gun.

objectives.desc: Harvest armor plates for the forges.

quests.title: Behemoth Target
quests.description: Aethel Corrupted Behemoths are priority targets. Any threat to Hegemony territory receives the same response: elimination.

quests.title: Abyssal Front
quests.description: Aethel Abyssal Reavers are the enemy's shock troops. Meet them with Hegemony steel.

quests.title: Orbital Defense Grid
quests.description: Rival factions probe the orbital defense grid. Remind them why Hegemony controls the skies.

objectives.desc: Neutralize void threats to the grid.

quests.title: Drake Hunt
quests.description: The Ashen Drake has been sighted again. This time, Hegemony authorizes a kill order. Bring it down.

objectives.desc: Hunt and kill the Ashen Drake.

quests.title: Ground Assault
quests.description: Full ground assault on enemy positions in the Skirmish Ring. Hegemony doctrine: overwhelming force.

quests.title: Abyssal Counter-Offensive
quests.description: The Abyss Counter-Offensive has begun. Multiple Reaver battalions advance on Hegemony positions. Break their offensive.

quests.title: Master Commander
quests.description: The Master Commander trial. Defeat the Ashen Drake and two elite guardians. Only the strongest lead Hegemony forces into battle.

quests.title: Subjugating the Chasm
quests.description: The Void Echo Chasm is the most hostile environment on Xylos. The Hegemony will establish a forward base here. Fear is not an option.

quests.title: Reaver Engagement
quests.description: Void Reavers are the chasm's defenders. Engage and destroy. Hegemony fears no darkness.

quests.title: Channeler Purge
quests.description: Void Channelers perform rituals that empower the Abyss. Purge them. The Hegemony leaves no enemy power source intact.

objectives.desc: Purge Void Channelers and their rituals.

quests.title: Abyssal Extermination
quests.description: Abyssal Reavers are the enemy's elite. Exterminate them. The Hegemony tolerates no elite but its own.

quests.title: Behemoth Elimination
quests.description: Corrupted Behemoths in the chasm are juiced on void energy. Prove that Hegemony steel cuts deeper than void corruption.

objectives.desc: Collect void-resistance data for armor research.

quests.title: Soul Breaker
quests.description: Soul Fragmenters attempt to break the minds of Hegemony soldiers. They will fail. Destroy these psychological warfare units.

quests.title: Chrono Elimination
quests.description: Chrono Wraiths warp time around Hegemony positions. Counter their temporal attacks with overwhelming firepower.

quests.title: Jotunn Break
quests.description: A Gigantic Jotunn blocks the advance. Hegemony doctrine: destroy the obstacle and keep moving.

objectives.desc: Deploy advance beacon past the Jotunn.

quests.title: Heart Breach
quests.description: The Shattered Heart is the enemy's core territory. Breach it. The Hegemony attacks — always.

quests.title: The Drake's Fall
quests.description: THE DRAKE EXECUTION. The Ashen Drake rules the Shattered Heart. The Hegemony will execute it. Raid Tier-1: lead the assault and bring down the Drake. Victory through Conquest.

objectives.desc: Clear Drake Minions from the lair.
Claim the Drake's head as trophy for the Bastion.

quests.title: Void Warfare
quests.description: The Soul Fragmenter threat has escalated. Multiple units are deploying. This is now a military campaign.

objectives.desc: Submit campaign status to High Command.

quests.title: Total Void Control
quests.description: Operation Total Void Control is authorized. Exterminate all void signatures in the chasm. The Hegemony does not share territory.

quests.title: Void Stalker Execution
quests.description: A Void Stalker has been hunting our soldiers. This insult to Hegemony strength will be answered with execution.

quests.title: Temporal Breach
quests.description: Chrono Wraiths create temporal breaches that trap our troops. Close the breaches with extreme prejudice.

objectives.desc: Destroy Chrono Wraiths and close breaches.

quests.title: Heart Assault
quests.description: Full assault on the Shattered Heart. Enemy Reaver battalions are dug in. Dig them out.

quests.title: Jotunn Strongpoint
quests.description: Gigantic Jotunns have fortified a position in the Heart. Hegemony doctrine for strongpoints: overwhelming force.

quests.title: Tyrant Battery
quests.description: Crystal Tyrants form a defensive battery in the Heart. Silence their guns.

quests.title: Harbinger Beachhead
quests.description: The Abyss Harbinger is the enemy high command. Establish a beachhead for the final assault.

objectives.desc: Eliminate Chrono Wraith defending the beachhead.

quests.title: Fragmenter Front
quests.description: Soul Fragmenters form the enemy's psychological warfare front. Break their front.

quests.title: Harbinger's Defeat
quests.description: FINAL ASSAULT ON THE ABYSS. The Abyss Harbinger is the enemy commander. Destroy it and claim total victory over the Void. THE HEGEMONY CONTROLS ALL.

objectives.desc: Claim the Harbinger's battle standard for the Bastion.

quests.title: Stabilizing the Front
quests.description: The Severance Faultline threatens planetary stability. The Hegemony does not negotiate with nature — we conquer it.

quests.title: Carapace Armor
quests.description: Aethel Iron Carapaces have armor that rivals Hegemony steel. Destroy them and study their composition.

objectives.desc: Collect armor samples for the forges.

quests.title: Tyrant Position
quests.description: Crystal Tyrants have taken positions along the fault. They are obstacles. Remove them.

quests.title: Jotunn Blockade
quests.description: Gigantic Jotunns blockade the main advance route. Break through. Nothing blocks the Hegemony advance.

quests.title: Power Core
quests.description: The Aethel Siphon Core is the planet's power source. The Hegemony will control the power. Enter and secure.

quests.title: Core Purge
quests.description: Hostile entities infest the Core. Purge them. The Core must be secure for Hegemony power operations.

objectives.desc: Purge hostile entities from the Core.

quests.title: Behemoth Defense
quests.description: Corrupted Behemoths assault the Core conduits. Defend the Core. Hegemony never surrenders a position.

quests.title: Rift Patrol
quests.description: Rift Stalkers use micro-rifts for ambush tactics. Counter-ambush them. Hegemony soldiers do not get ambushed.

quests.title: Titan Mobilization
quests.description: Intelligence confirms: the Gravity Titan is mobilizing. The Hegemony prepares for the largest military operation in our history.

objectives.desc: Defeat a Jotunn scout for the Titan.

quests.title: Toppling the Titan
quests.description: MAXIMUM PRIORITY: OPERATION TITANFALL. The Gravity Titan threatens to collapse Xylos. The Iron Hegemony will topple it. This is the largest military engagement in Hegemony history. Every soldier. Every tank. Every ounce of steel. BRING IT DOWN.

objectives.desc: Secure the Titan Core for Hegemony weapons research.

quests.title: The Hegemony Forge
quests.description: The Prima Materia Forge will become the Hegemony's primary weapons factory. Secure it for mass production.

quests.title: Defense Neutralization
quests.description: Ancient Forge defenses still operate. Neutralize them. The Forge serves the Hegemony now.

quests.title: Forge Purification
quests.description: Corrupted Behemoths contaminate the Forge. Purify the facility. Hegemony weapons require pure materials.

quests.title: Abyssal Purge
quests.description: Abyssal forces attempt to claim the Forge. Purge them with maximum force.

quests.title: Jotunn Foundry
quests.description: Jotunns use the Forge's heat as weapons. Disarm and destroy them. The Forge's fire belongs to the Hegemony.

quests.title: Apex Production
quests.description: Operation Apex Production begins. The Forge will mass-produce Hegemony Apex-class weapons. Secure the production floor.

quests.title: Automaton Override
quests.description: Titan Forge Automatons resist our control. Override them — by any means necessary.

quests.title: Proto Core Recycling
quests.description: Titan Proto Cores are failed Titans — but their materials are valuable. Recycle them into Hegemony steel.

quests.title: Supreme General Trial
quests.description: The final trial before Supreme General rank. Defeat both Titan and Harbinger in a single campaign. Show the galaxy what Hegemony steel can do.

quests.title: Supreme General
quests.description: High Commander Varkas himself will pin the Supreme General insignia on your chest. Return to the Bastion. The Hegemony salutes you.

quests.title: Apex Predator
quests.description: The Hidden Aethelgardian City contains Precursor weapons technology. The Hegemony will not allow any faction to claim it first.

quests.title: City Garrison
quests.description: The City has automated defenses. Destroy them. Hegemony takes what it wants.

quests.title: Weapons Cache
quests.description: The City holds Precursor weapons caches. Secure them all for the Hegemony arsenal.

objectives.desc: Eliminate forces drawn to the weapons.

quests.title: Apex Drake Elimination
quests.description: The Ashen Drake has evolved to Apex form. Eliminate it. Hegemony tolerates no rivals — especially winged ones.

quests.title: Apex Harbinger Destruction
quests.description: The Abyss Harbinger has been reborn. Destroy it again. And again if necessary. Hegemony victory is permanent.

quests.title: Apex Titan Fall
quests.description: The Gravity Titan manifests once more. Hegemony response unchanged: destroy it. Again.

quests.title: Tri-Threat Offensive
quests.description: All three Apex entities — Drake, Titan, Harbinger. The Hegemony will destroy them all in a single campaign. Triple offensive authorized.

quests.title: Core Command
quests.description: The Aethel Siphon Core becomes Hegemony Central Command. Establish full military control of the planetary power grid.

quests.title: World Engine Subjugation
quests.description: The World Engine can reshape Xylos. The Hegemony will make it our ultimate weapon. Secure it absolutely.

quests.title: Engine Activation
quests.description: Activate the World Engine. This is the moment Hegemony dominance becomes absolute. Defend the activation at all costs.

quests.title: Final Purge
quests.description: With the Engine online, remaining hostiles are flushed to the surface. Execute the final purge at the Faultline.

quests.title: Void Annihilation
quests.description: The Void is collapsing. Annihilate the remaining void forces. The Hegemony will erase the Abyss from history.

quests.title: Tyrant Extermination
quests.description: Crystal Tyrants make their last stand. Exterminate them. The Hegemony leaves no enemy standing.

quests.title: Forge Final Production
quests.description: The Forge enters final mass production. Eliminate the last remaining threats to production.

quests.title: Expanse Conquest
quests.description: The Cradle Expanse is now Hegemony sovereign territory. Enforce it.

quests.title: Orbital Command
quests.description: From orbit, the Hegemony watches over our conquered world. Maintain orbital supremacy forever.

quests.title: The Final Campaign
quests.description: The Hegemony launches the Final Campaign to eliminate all significant threats. Channel your command authority into the war effort.

quests.title: The Final Conquest
quests.description: Only the ultimate conquest remains. Face the three Apex entities — Jotunn, Drake, Harbinger. The Hegemony conquers all.

quests.title: Eternal Hegemon Trial
quests.description: The deepest Void Echo Chasm holds the final test. Defeat the eternal forms of Titan and Harbinger in single combat. The Hegemony demands nothing less than total victory.

quests.title: Eternal Hegemon
quests.description: You have conquered everything. Titan. Harbinger. Drake. All have fallen to Hegemony steel. Return to the Bastion as the ETERNAL HEGEMON. Your name will be forged into the Bastion's walls forever. Strength through Unity. Power through Conquest. Forever.

objectives.desc: Return to the Bastion as the Eternal Hegemon.
Receive the Eternal Hegemon honors from High Commander Varkas.
